pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-T-020 (AI & ML/Task) scores 0.508 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.508). Scope is in_scope for SaMD Quality/Regulatory Affairs Officer: 3 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with in_scope scope, AI & ML, composite 0.508. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support AI & ML for SaMD Quality/Regulatory Affairs Officer?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI & ML appears in approximately 55% of SaMD Quality/Regulatory Affairs Officer job postings. AI/ML in SaMD is a growing competency requirement for regulatory review of adaptive algorithms.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. AI & ML is market-validated for SaMD Quality/Regulatory Affairs Officer. Final decision: include.
